user_system_path: Seam #402 — the indispensability pass: 'act, don't assign homework.' The guardian's Slack ping carries a primary Review & send button (only for grounded send_message drafts backed by a real tkg_actions id). It opens a Slack modal — recipient read-only, editable subject + body, source trail — and submit IS the explicit sign-off, which runs the existing executeAction layer to send from the owner's own Gmail, updates the ping to '✓ Sent', records the move done, and flips the row to executed (visible in dashboard Recent Work). No auto-send; live send stays behind ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — Gmail send mocked at the boundary; Slack adapter test-safe.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #402: the review-gated send wiring — workday-presence model/message/seed mapping, the Slack adapter + interaction route, the seed-from-scorer + daily-brief seed call sites, plus control-plane + docs.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**) and no dependency changes (package.json / lock) — the send reuses the existing executeAction + Gmail layer.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Harness-proven (224 workday-presence/slack/conviction tests + new interaction-route send tests). Live owner validation is owner-side: set ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true, trigger a guardian ping, tap Review & send, sign off, confirm a real Gmail send — BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT until then.
acceptance_condition: Review & send appears only on grounded send_message drafts with a real action_id; the modal sign-off executes via executeAction and updates the ping; armed-off path reports email_send_disabled honestly; no send without a backing action_id; gate:continuity + build + lint green.
anti_regression_checks: no send path without an explicit modal sign-off (no auto-send)
no send without a real tkg_actions action_id behind the draft
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #402 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on the owner-side live send validation.
next_command: Owner: set ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND=true in prod, trigger a guardian ping, tap Review & send, sign off, and confirm a real Gmail send + '✓ Sent'. Separately still open: the free external 15-min cron for guardian firing cadence.
